# PlugPulse

> Open-source, community-verified EV charger reliability. PlugPulse shows where EV
> chargers are and whether they actually work right now, using one-tap reports from
> the community with a freshness-weighted reliability score. Built on open data
> (Open Charge Map, OpenStreetMap) and free to self-host.

## Core
- [Home](https://plugpulse.vercel.app/): Find working EV chargers near you, verified by the community.
- [How it works](https://plugpulse.vercel.app/how-it-works): How community reports and the reliability score work.
- [FAQ](https://plugpulse.vercel.app/faq): Common questions about coverage, accuracy, and privacy.

## Project
- [GitHub](https://github.com/AayushCharde/PlugPulseEV): Source code (AGPL-3.0), self-hosting instructions.
- [About](https://plugpulse.vercel.app/about): Why PlugPulse exists and how the data stays open.

## Optional
- [Open data & attribution](https://plugpulse.vercel.app/data): Data sources and licenses (Open Charge Map, OpenFreeMap, OpenStreetMap).
